lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Riiiiight...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll just be over here if you need me.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Whadda ya want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whadda ya got?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: We gots grog and we gots food. Here, take a look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing! Honest!

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Then stop takin' up me floor space!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wanted to know where you got that harpoon hand.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Yer new in town aintcha?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Newish certainly.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: Well, if ye wants te hear the story, here goes.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: See, I was walkin' along the docks one day, and this fierce storm blew up.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: All of a sudden I turn an there, bearin' down on me is this albatross...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry to interrupt, but I would just like to clear something up.

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: What? I was just gettin' to the good bit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When I said 'I wanted to know where you got that harpoon hand', I meant where did you get it made, or buy it from?

lines.speaker: Joe
lines.text: If ye don't wants to hear the story then I ain't gonna tell ye!
